title: send_payment: scan_tip/spendable_notes TOCTOU can use mismatched anchor
description: payment.rs send_payment reads scan_tip (await 1) then spendable_notes (await 2). Between the two awaits the scanner task can run save_block_state and advance witnesses to scan_tip+1. spendable_notes() then returns witnesses at the new tip while anchor_height still holds the old scan_tip. The builder receives witnesses rooted at N+1 but anchor_height=N. Although the builder uses the actual witness root (not anchor_height) for the Sapling proof, the mismatch can cause a subtle proof failure if the anchor_height is used for any fee or expiry logic. Mitigation already noted in code comment but no guard implemented.
